title: festuca rubra subsp. pluriflora
intro: Festuca rubra subsp. pluriflora, commonly known as red fescue, is a subspecies of grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Festuca rubra subsp. pluriflora include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
